name: homelab-assist
description: A growing collection of Claude Code plugins for managing homelab infrastructure (Proxmox, Docker, and more). API-first, SSH-as-last-resort, with built-in safety confirmation and version-correct research conventions.

plugins.name: homelab-core
plugins.description: Shared conventions for all homelab plugins: change-approval safety policy, SSH-confirmation gate, and how to research version-correct canonical docs. Install this alongside any other homelab-assist plugin.

plugins.name: proxmox
plugins.description: Manage Proxmox VE via the REST API first (VMs, LXC, storage, backups, updates, cluster) and drop to host-level config edits only when required (GPU passthrough, lxc.idmap, hookscripts, networking). Version-aware.

plugins.name: docker
plugins.description: Manage Docker compose stacks across your homelab. Dockhand-first (with Hawser agents), plus Portainer and Dockge support, shared compose knowledge, nginx-proxy-manager label routing, and Docker-on-Proxmox networking/storage patterns.
